rulings.Case Title: LOREINOS DOMINGO et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. (A.K.A. BAC HOME LOANS) et al

rulings.Case Title: MONTEJANO ARACELY RODRIGUEZ VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Aracely Montejano Rodriguez'S Motion To Postpone A Non Judicial Foreclosure
rulings.Rulings: Plaintiff Aracely Montejano Rodriguez's Motion To Postpone A Non Judicial Foreclosure. Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 19, 2012, line 3. Grant motion to postpone, no competent evidence to counter plaintiff's declaration. Objection sustained as to Jose Castaneda's declaration, no personal knowledge and no authentication letters. = (501/REQ)
